task_summary: Pearl_Editor STAGE 2 — variant count strategy
decision: Per cell: 5 TEACHER_DOCTRINE + 3 PERMISSION_GRANT + 5 QUOTE + 6 new EXERCISE = 19 new variants per cell × 4 cells = 76 new variants. Exceeds 48-variant minimum and exceeds gold-ref counts in most categories (gold-ref gen_z_professionals/anxiety has 5 TEACHER_DOCTRINE, 1 PERMISSION_GRANT, 30 EXERCISE). Prioritized TEACHER_DOCTRINE depth (5 mechanisms per cell) and EXERCISE breadth (9 variants per cell including 3 existing).

EXERCISE got the most variants because: existing 2-3 variants were too generic (e.g., "Cold water on your wrists. Ten seconds.") and the gold-ref shows EXERCISE at 30+ variants. New variants are occupation-specific and 50-150 words each, matching gold-ref length envelope.
escalated: yes — alternative: author only the minimum 3 per type per cell = 48 variants. Rejected: per directive "make REAL progress" + variant-richness reduces downstream Pearl_Localization burden and bestseller-chapter selection collisions.

task_summary: DURATION-DERIVATION-01: standard_book advertised-duration reconciliation (label + word-range cap)
decision_axis: standard_book duration label + word_range cap reconciliation
decision: Derive standard_book's advertised label from the REAL gold render (~21.5k words -> ~143 min audiobook at 150 WPM); set cap_word_target=22000 (-> audiobook_minutes 147, ebook_minutes 96) and raise the registry word_range ceiling 18000->22000 so the systematic ~21.5k render stops tripping the word-range gate. Replaces 'raise cap to mask overshoot, label never moves' with 'raise cap AND re-derive label together.'
rationale: Books are gold-quality and the right length; the 55-min label was the defect (+161% vs real 2h23m). A buyer shown ~1 hour who gets 2h23m is a refund/low-review risk even though longer is more value. RECOMMENDATIONS.md:32 recommends the cap raise to 22k as the default. The 20k->22k there is relative to the depth-fill target; against the registry ceiling on main it is 18k->22k. Reversible (revert the two registry fields). FLAGGED for operator: changes a customer-facing advertised number 55 -> ~147 min.

task_summary: DURATION-DERIVATION-01: duration-derivation CI guard acceptance band = +/-15% (distinct from scorecard 10%)
decision: The check_duration_derivation() acceptance band is +/-15% (recorded in spec + guard docstring; computed at v2 value-level). It is deliberately WIDER than config/duration_scorecard.yaml duration_tolerance_pct:10, which stays for render MEASUREMENT. v1 of the guard is path-level co-change (no diff values available).
rationale: Using the scorecard's measurement 10% as the label-acceptance band would incorrectly flag the two already-accepted honest deep formats (deep_book_4h -11%, deep_book_6h +2%). Two single-purpose bands: 10% measures renders, 15% accepts derived labels (the audit's <=+/-15% 'fine' boundary). In-envelope: a CI-internal tolerance choice, no customer-facing or destructive effect; reversible by editing one constant.

task_summary: DURATION-DERIVATION-01 ladder: operator ratifies honest 7-tier duration ladder + 1-hour tier (9000w) + CJK per-locale rule; authorizes #1550 merge (standard_book 55->147 advertised)
decision_axis: advertised-duration ladder structure + 1hr tier + CJK per-locale rule + #1550 merge authorization
decision: Operator (Ahjan) approved: (a) honest 7-tier ladder [Quick Reset ~25m / Mini ~30m / Short ~45m / One-Hour ~1h / Standard ~2.5h / Long-Form ~3.5h / Complete ~6h]; (b) add first-class one_hour_book (word_target 9000 = 60min audiobook); (c) CJK per-locale char-based durations (ja 2.15 chars/word MEASURED; zh/ko PROVISIONAL, gated on a measured render, Pearl Star off); (d) merge #1550 (re-label live). HONESTY SPINE (non-negotiable): advertise each format's REAL median-render duration, NOT the word_target aspiration; a thin Standard render HARD_FAILs the word_count_gate rather than ships claiming 2.5h; books grow into the ladder via the writing program. Extends OPD-20260611-062 (standard_book reconciliation) + -063 (+/-15% guard band).
rationale: Advertised duration was a hand-set label off by up to +167% (standard_book 55->147); re-deriving word_target/150 (PR #1550) fixes the SSOT and 10 overlapping formats become 7 legible tiers. Books render thin today (~5k vs 22k) so advertise REAL duration and never trade 'too short' for 'too long'. CJK is char-based (zh ~1.26x EN, ja ~1.08x, ko ~0.91x); zh/ko rates are estimates pending a measured render. In-envelope: operator-present Tier-1 approval; reversible (revert #1550 + label layer).
